title: MemoryEntry
description: Formal JSON Schema for the hardened arifOS MemoryEntry dataclass. Includes fields from H7 (TTL/lifecycle), H8 (audit), and H9 (composite scoring) hardening plan. Constitutional floors: F1 Amanah (audit), F2 Haqq (truth), F4 Nur (entropy), F12 Hifz (injection defense).

id.description: Unique identifier for the memory entry (UUID v4). Auto-generated on store.

content.description: The memory content text. Must be non-empty.

area.description: Memory area classification. MAIN: primary domain knowledge and facts. FRAGMENTS: partial, incomplete, or exploratory information. SOLUTIONS: verified solutions, working code, resolved problems. INSTRUMENTS: tools, configurations, operational parameters.

project_id.description: Project context namespace for the memory entry.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of content field for integrity verification (F1 Amanah tamper detection).

f1_pseudo_embedding.description: H4: True if stored vector is a SHA-256 pseudo-embedding generated when BGE-M3 was unavailable. Pseudo-embeddings have zero semantic meaning and are quarantined from similarity ranking.

f2_verified.description: Whether this entry passed F2 Haqq multi-signal truth verification on last retrieval. Set by _verify_truth() in constitutional_memory.py.

f2_confidence.description: H5: Composite F2 Haqq truth confidence score computed at last recall. Formula: 0.30*age_score + 0.20*access_score + 0.30*source_score + 0.20*embedding_quality_score. Threshold: entry passes if >= 0.55.

f4_entropy_delta.description: F4 Nur entropy delta from storage-time clarity check. Negative value = entropy reduction (content adds clarity). Positive value = entropy increase (flagged as unclear). Target: <= 0.

f12_clean.description: Whether content passed F12 Hifz PNS·SHIELD injection scan at storage time. False means blocked — this field should only appear in quarantine records.

f12_score.description: F12 Hifz injection scan score from storage time. 0.0 = completely clean. > 0.7 = blocked. Score stored for audit trail even when clean.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the memory was first stored. Never modified after creation.

last_accessed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent recall via vector_query. Updated on each access. Used in H5 F2 recency scoring and H9 composite ranking.

access_count.description: Number of times this memory has been retrieved by vector_query. Incremented on each successful recall. Used in H5 F2 access frequency scoring (signal weight: 0.20) and H9 access ranking (weight: 0.10).

source.description: Origin source identifier. Known values and credibility weights: user=1.0, import=0.9, engineering_memory=0.8, vector_store=0.8, agent=0.7, knowledge_pipeline=0.7, evidence_bundle=0.6, unknown=0.4.

source_agent.description: Agent or session ID that created this memory. Null for direct user stores. Used in F1 Amanah audit trail.

ttl_days.description: H7: Time-to-live in days from created_at. null means permanent (no TTL). When TTL expires, lifecycle enforcement transitions state to 'stale'. Set at store time; cannot be changed without a new store.

lifecycle_state.description: H7: Current lifecycle state. active: normal operation. stale: TTL expired or not accessed in 30+ days — still queryable but down-ranked. archived: stale + 60+ days without access — excluded from default queries. tombstone: soft-deleted — excluded from all queries, pending hard purge at 180 days post-tombstone.

composite_score.description: H9: Composite ranking score computed at last query time. null if never queried after H9 hardening. Formula: 0.45*cosine + 0.20*recency + 0.10*access + 0.15*source + 0.10*area. Higher is better.

score_breakdown.description: H9: Per-signal breakdown of composite_score at last query time. null if never scored.

cosine.description: Semantic cosine similarity to the query. Weight: 0.45 (primary signal).

recency.description: Recency score using exponential decay: 2^(-age_days/90). 90-day half-life. Weight: 0.20.

access.description: Access frequency score: min(1.0, (1 + access_count) / 21). Saturates at 20 accesses. Weight: 0.10.

source.description: Source credibility weight (see source field for lookup table). Weight: 0.15.

area.description: Area priority: SOLUTIONS=1.0, MAIN=0.8, INSTRUMENTS=0.7, FRAGMENTS=0.5. Weight: 0.10.

examples.content: F1 Amanah is the Trust floor. It enforces that all irreversible actions have permanent audit trails. Confidence: 1.0. Enforcement: HARD VOID.
